default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize launch readiness and review key development items.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Subcategory Feature Merging Tomorrow:** The new subcategory feature will merge tomorrow, enabling users to change categories post-onboarding. The implementation will *not* deactivate old prompts, a decision made to preserve user work and avoid data loss.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [**Performance Risk Mitigated:** The feature's backfill process poses a performance risk (high latency, DB load). The team will proceed after confirming average prompt counts are low, deferring a complex async solution for now.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [**Prompt Relevance is a Critical Issue:** A user's feedback ("irrelevant prompts") highlights a core problem: the current category system fails niche users. The proposed solution is a prompt recommendation engine, not just better categorization.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [**New Analytics & Feedback Pipeline:** PostHog dashboards are live for key metrics (e.g., user stickiness), and a list of active users is ready for feedback outreach, creating a new data-driven feedback loop.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)

## Topics

### Subcategory Feature & Performance Risk

  - [The subcategory feature PR is in review and will merge tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [**Implementation:** New subcategories activate prompts from the library; old prompts are *not* deactivated.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [**Performance Risk:** The backfill process is synchronous, creating a risk of high latency and DB load if a user activates many subcategories with hundreds of prompts each.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [**Decision:** Proceed with the current implementation after confirming average prompt counts are low. This defers a more complex async solution (e.g., `perform_all_later`) for now.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [**Context:** A recent bug fix (merged) correctly persists the *primary* category during onboarding, resolving a data integrity issue.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)

### Prompt Relevance & User Feedback

  - [A user's Intercom feedback ("irrelevant prompts") highlighted a critical issue: the current category system fails niche users (e.g., "ASC software" in healthcare).](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The user's category ("healthcare") is too broad, leading to a poor prompt experience.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** A prompt recommendation engine, leveraging existing brand context (personas, product info), to suggest highly relevant prompts. This is seen as more valuable than just better categorization.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [**Strategic Question:** How much development time should be invested in supporting long-tail categories? This will be discussed in the cross-functional meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [**Action:** Stevie will update the "prompt recommendation" ticket with this user feedback to boost its priority.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)

### Analytics & User Feedback Pipeline

  - [New PostHog dashboards are live, focusing on actionable metrics over vanity metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
      - [**Key Dashboard:** User stickiness (day 1, 2, 3 return rates).](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [A list of the top 18 active users from the last 14 days is ready for feedback outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [**Action:** Share all new dashboards and insights with the team to prevent duplicated work.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)

### Other Dev Updates

  - [**Brand Flagging:** A new admin flag identifies \~30 brands with incomplete profiles.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
      - [**Tomorrow's Tasks:** Add a manual unflag option and improve name-matching logic to reduce false positives.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [**Cadence Work:** Jose is working on this, targeting completion by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [**Sources Page:** Jacopo will resume optimization after pagination is re-added.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Pedro:**](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
      - [Confirm average prompt counts per subcategory before merging the feature.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
      - [Merge the subcategory feature PR tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
      - [Add a manual unflag option to the admin brand show page.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
      - [Improve brand name-matching logic to reduce false positives.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
      - [Backfill the brand perception citation rate data.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [**Jose:**](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
      - [Complete the cadence work by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [**Stevie:**](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
      - [Update the "prompt recommendation" ticket with user feedback to increase priority.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
      - [Review P1 tickets to ensure prioritization aligns with current goals.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
      - [Share new PostHog dashboards and insights with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
      - [Discuss the prompt relevance strategy in the cross-functional meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/tHsE8De5YNFv8g5K4F2cxF1izJYsfo-C?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)

action_items.description: Run numbers on prompts/subcat; enforce cap; merge categorization PR; then run visibility-prompts backfill
Review prompt-recommendation ticket; assign to Pedro; add Intercom healthcare feedback
Add manual unflag on brand show; improve name matching for overview flags
